title: Overeating Different Fats and Influence on Muscle Mass and Body Fat Accumulation
text:
Summary: To investigate metabolic and molecular response to fatty acid-specific overfeeding in overweight subjects, in relation to changes in ectopic fat, lean tissue mass and insulin sensitivity
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Body mass index 25-32 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Type 2 diabetes 

 Type 1 diabetes 

 Kidney disease 

 Liver disease 

 Abnormal clinical chemistry at screening 

 Intense physical exercise > 2 hours per week 

 Use of statins or drugs affecting energy metabolism 

 Use of extreme diets
